    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    GameController.highlightActivePlayer(IPlayer current)
    Highlights the active player's zone with a golden border and full card opacity, while dimming all other players' hands to 0.35 opacity.

    GameController.renderMachineHand(javafx.scene.layout.Pane box, IPlayer player)

    Classes in com.example._0tazo.model that implement IPlayer
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractPlayer
    Abstract base implementation of IPlayer that manages the shared state and logic common to all player types in the Cincuentazo game.
    class 
    ComputerPlayer
    Represents an AI-controlled player in the Cincuentazo card game.
    class 
    HumanPlayer
    Represents the human player in the Cincuentazo card game.

    Methods in com.example._0tazo.model with parameters of type IPlayer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private int
    GameTest.findIllegalCardIndex(IPlayer player, int currentSum)
    Returns the index of the first card that would be illegal to play, or -1 if all cards are legal.
    private int
    GameTest.findLegalCardIndex(IPlayer player, int currentSum)
    Returns the index of the first legally playable card in the hand, or -1 if none exists.
